org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity

Class FigureView.EventHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity.FigureView.EventHandler
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    EventListener, SelectionListener, ViewComponentBindingListener, ViewComponentChangeListener, ViewComponentLayoutListener, ViewComponentPropertyChangeListener, ModelObjectListener
    Enclosing class:
    FigureView<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>

    protected class FigureView.EventHandler
extends Object
implements ModelObjectListener, ViewComponentChangeListener, ViewComponentPropertyChangeListener, ViewComponentLayoutListener, ViewComponentBindingListener, SelectionListener
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:10
    Author:
    Mahdi HANNOUN, Stéphane GALLAND, Marc BAUMGARTNER
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-androidpanel

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      FigureView.EventHandler() 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void collisionAvoidance(ViewComponent component)
      Invoked when a component wants to be moved to avoid any collision with the other view components.
      void componentAddition(Figure figure)
      Invoked when a component should be added into the view.
      void componentChange(ViewComponentChangeEvent event)
      Invoked when a property has changed.
      void componentCreation(Figure parent, ModelObject modelObject)
      Invoked when a component wants to be created.
      void componentRemoval(Figure figure)
      Invoked when a component should be removed from the view.
      void componentRemoval(Figure parent, SubFigure subfigure)
      Invoked when a component wants to be removed.
      void componentRepaint(ViewComponent component, boolean boundsChanged)
      Invoked when a component wants to be repainted.
      void modelComponentAdded(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time a component was added.
      void modelComponentRemoved(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time a component was removed.
      void modelContainerChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the container of a model object has changed.
      void modelContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the content of a model object has changed.
      void modelLinkChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the link to an other model object has changed.
      void modelPropertyChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the property of a model has changed.
      void propertyChange(ViewComponentPropertyChangeEvent event)
      Invoked when a property has changed.
      void selectionChanged(SelectionEvent event) 

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

        Invoked each time the link to an other model object has changed.

      • componentChange

        public void componentChange(ViewComponentChangeEvent event)
        Description copied from interface: ViewComponentChangeListener
        Invoked when a property has changed.
        Specified by:
        componentChange in interface ViewComponentChangeListener
        Parameters:
        event - describes the event.

      • propertyChange

        public void propertyChange(ViewComponentPropertyChangeEvent event)
        Description copied from interface: ViewComponentPropertyChangeListener
        Invoked when a property has changed.
        Specified by:
        propertyChange in interface ViewComponentPropertyChangeListener
        Parameters:
        event - describes the event.

      • componentRepaint

        public void componentRepaint(ViewComponent component,
                    boolean boundsChanged)
        Description copied from interface: ViewComponentLayoutListener
        Invoked when a component wants to be repainted.
        Specified by:
        componentRepaint in interface ViewComponentLayoutListener
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to repaint.
        boundsChanged - indicates if the repaint is due to a change in bounds; or not.

      • collisionAvoidance

        public void collisionAvoidance(ViewComponent component)
        Description copied from interface: ViewComponentLayoutListener
        Invoked when a component wants to be moved to avoid any collision with the other view components.
        Specified by:
        collisionAvoidance in interface ViewComponentLayoutListener
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to move.

      • componentCreation

        public void componentCreation(Figure parent,
                     ModelObject modelObject)
        Description copied from interface: ViewComponentBindingListener
        Invoked when a component wants to be created.
        Specified by:
        componentCreation in interface ViewComponentBindingListener
        Parameters:
        parent - is the graphical component that should be the parent of the new component. It must be never null.
        modelObject - is the model object for which the graphical component should be created. It must be never null.

      • componentRemoval

        public void componentRemoval(Figure parent,
                    SubFigure subfigure)
        Description copied from interface: ViewComponentBindingListener
        Invoked when a component wants to be removed.
        Specified by:
        componentRemoval in interface ViewComponentBindingListener
        Parameters:
        parent - is the graphical component that is the parent of the component to remove. It must be never null.
        subfigure - is the graphical component to remove. It must be never null.

      • componentAddition

        public void componentAddition(Figure figure)
        Description copied from interface: ViewComponentBindingListener
        Invoked when a component should be added into the view.
        Specified by:
        componentAddition in interface ViewComponentBindingListener
        Parameters:
        figure - is the graphical component to add. It must be never null.

      • componentRemoval

        public void componentRemoval(Figure figure)
        Description copied from interface: ViewComponentBindingListener
        Invoked when a component should be removed from the view.
        Specified by:
        componentRemoval in interface ViewComponentBindingListener
        Parameters:
        figure - is the graphical component to remove. It must be never null.

      • selectionChanged

        public void selectionChanged(SelectionEvent event)
        Specified by:
        selectionChanged in interface SelectionListener
